bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je

presladak je

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park

Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St GeorgeŌĆÖs Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: 'Non-paper' o podjeli BiH: Reakcije ─Źlanova Predsjedni┼Ītva
snippet.description:
Sva tri ─Źlana Predsjedni┼Ītva Bosne i Hercegovine reagovala su na tekst slovenskog portala "Necenzurisano" koji je objavio "non-paper" koji je navodno Vlada Slovenije uputila u Brisel, a koji predvi─æa podjelu Bosne i Hercegovine.

┼Įeljko Kom┼Īi─ć, koji je ranije potvrdio da je aktuelni predsednik Slovenije Borut Pahor pitao da li je mogu─ć miran razlaz u Bosni i Hercegovini, poru─Źio je da su ideje koje su predstavljene u tom dokumentu nu─æene i prije rata, pa se na njih nije pristalo.

┼Āefik D┼Šaferovi─ć ka┼Še da ne zna odakle dokument dolazi, ali da njegovo prisustvo u medijima predstavlja dovoljan znak za uzbunu. Dodaje i da se ovo mo┼Še tuma─Źiti kao vid pritiska i lobiranja u pogledu izmjene izbornog zakona i ograni─Źenih ustavnih promjena.

Predsjedavaju─ći Predsjedni┼Ītva BiH Milorad Dodik u Beogradu je poru─Źio da pitanje mirnog razlaza ili rata ne zavisi od doma─ćih aktera, ve─ć isklju─Źivo od SAD-a. Dodaje i da ─će Srbija sve vi┼Īe morati da bude involvirana u unutra┼Īnja pitanja BiH.

#BiH

snippet.title: Audi RS6 generations DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click┬Āhttps://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow┬Āand my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Check this out, RS6 fans - weŌĆÖve brought in every generation of the RS6 and they're going head-to-head in an almighty drag race! From the 450hp C5 through to the current 600hp C8, weŌĆÖre here to find out just how these four generations of RS6 perform over the quarter-mile. 

As youŌĆÖd expect, MatŌĆÖs in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, weŌĆÖve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although itŌĆÖs also slightly down on torque (750Nm). 

The C6 may be several years older, but when you consider itŌĆÖs powered by a 5-litre twin-turbo V10, itŌĆÖs surely got to be in with a shout, right? Or perhaps the C5, with its 4.2-litre twin-turbo V8, could spring a surprise? 

All we know is, thereŌĆÖs only one way to find outŌĆ” LETŌĆÖS RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.title: Oko: Vladimir Leposavi─ć, ministar zbog ─Źije se izjave o Srebrenici drma Vlada Crna Gore
snippet.description:
Ko ─će politi─Źki pre┼Šiveti: premijer Krivokapi─ć ili ministar Leposavi─ć i postoji li opcija da ponovo zajedno rade

Kada je izabrana vlada Zdravka Krivokapi─ća za ministra pravde Vladimira Leposavi─ća govorilo se da je blizak Mitropoliji crnogorsko-primorskoj. Citirali su njegovu biografiju, a u njoj stoji da je bio jedan od najboljih studenata beogradskog Pravnog fakulteta, da je bio stipendista Fondacije Robert ┼Āuman, dobitnik Fulbrajtove nagrade, doktor prava.

Ipak poslednjih 15-ak dana o njemu se govori u druga─Źijem kontekstu, deo politi─Źke elite u Podgorici zove ga negatorom genocida u Srebrenici i ─Źovekom koji relativizuje zlo─Źine. Drugi deo elite ga brani, smatra da je politi─Źki stradao zbog verbalnog delikta. U mnogim crnogorskim gradovima ljudi su iza┼Īli na ulice kada je Zdravko Krivokapi─ć pokrenuo proces njegove smene. I sada je vlada Zdravka Krivokapi─ća u najve─ćoj krizi, pitanje je ko ─će politi─Źki pre┼Šiveti - Leposavi─ć ili Krivokapi─ć. ┼Āta je ta─Źno Leposavi─ć rekao na sednici Skup┼Ītine Crne Gore 26. marta, ┼Īta misli o Srebrenici, ┼Īta o Ha┼Īkom tribunalu i da li ─će podneti ostavku.

Ekskluzivno za Oko govori ministar pravde i ljudskih i manjinskih prava u Vladi Crne Gore Vladimir Leposavi─ć. S njim razgovara Stevan Kosti─ć.

Ovaj ro─æeni Sarajlija otkriva kako je pred granatama bio prinu─æen da napusti rodni grad i ┼Īta je sve pro┼Īao dok se nije sku─ćio u prestonici. Nesu─æenom fudbaleru je omiljeni sport zaista najva┼Šnija sporedna stvar na svetu i jedino oko ─Źega ume da se "zaka─Źi" sa svojom suprugom.
Vide─ćete kako se Bojan sna┼Īao na pijaci a kako u kuhinji i za┼Īto njegova lep┼Īa polovina ka┼Še da je tu, prvenstveno, odli─Źan degustator.

snippet.title: Emanet 160. B├Čl├╝m | Legacy Episode 160
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman K─▒r─▒ml─▒ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherŌĆÖs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewŌĆ” Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleŌĆÖs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the K─▒r─▒ml─▒ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO SA RR - LEA STANKOVIC : JAKO SAM TESKA I POVUCENA OSOBA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Lea Stankovic! Kakav je bio njen pocetak na youtubeu, ko u poslu moze najvise da je iznervira i ko je Lea kada se ugase kamere, saznacete u danasnjoj epizodi.
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

WIIP: https://wiip.rs

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3/

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: BEZ USTRU─īAVANJA - ┼Įeljko Panti─ć: Vu─Źi─ć ─će napraviti ovde pokolj ako bude branio svoje bogatstvo!
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Bez ustru─Źavanja" bio je direktor Danas konferens centra ┼Įeljko Panti─ć. Panti─ć smatra da je glavni uzrok poraza Partizana u ve─Źitom derbiju pogre┼Īan in┼Šenjering tima koji je sastavio aktuelni trener Aleksandar Stanojevi─ć. Po Panti─ću to je dokaz da neprijatelji Partizana kadriraju tim Partizana koji ne sme da izvede svoj najja─Źi sastav protiv Crvene Zvezde. Uprava Partizana po Panti─ćevom svedo─Źenju vodila je takozvanu ┼Āindlerovu politiku spa┼Īavanja Partizana u vreme okupacije i poku┼Īala je da ubla┼Ši sve udarce koji su stizali od strane re┼Šima SNS-a. Verbalni napad Vu─Źi─ća na predsednika Partizana Vu─Źeli─ća bio je samo jedan vid maltretiranja i poni┼Šavanja i to iskustvo do┼Šiveli su i ostali ─Źlanovi uprave. Panti─ć smatra da je izvestan skori pad Vu─Źi─ća sa vlasti i da on ulazi u zadnju fazu svoje vladavine koja mo┼Še da podse─ća na poslednju fazu vlasti Slobodana Milo┼Īevi─ća kada ranjeni re┼Šim po─Źinje i fizi─Źki da uklanja konkurente. Politika koketiranja i sa istokom i sa zapadom ima─će katastrofalne posledice po Srbiju, a ameri─Źki predsednik ┼Šeli da zavr┼Īi posao na Balkanu i za┼Ītiti ameri─Źke interese pre izbora za Senat i Kongres koji dolaze slede─će godine, tvrdi Panti─ć.

Rezerve: Babi─ć, Vico, Ru┼Īevi─ć, Balabanovi─ć, Jovanovi─ć, Basari─ć, Zvekanov, Stojanovi─ć, Tanko, Jeli─ć.

snippet.description:

Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode mo┼Šete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak pri─Źe o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" pri─Źa o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih manga┼Īa ─Źiji postupci se i dan danas prepri─Źavaju. Na ─Źelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih ┼Šestokih momaka sa na┼Īih prostora, za─Źetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir Maga┼Ī, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Pravi─Źan, patriota pomalo preke naravi re┼Īavao je situacije u hodu. snippet.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXyŌĆŗ
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0EŌĆŗ
*make sure to tag me on instagram if you paint your own!!!

*LAST CHANCE for the Rubik's Cube pre-order. Don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ­¤śé ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

INSTAGRAM: 
https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

TIKTOK:
https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

SNAPCHAT:
MoriahOfficial

VISIT ME WEBSITE:
https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite
